statements.raw: //判断事务号大小并记录本次事务号.

<M>[通用SQL执行][select transaction_no
                    from uarg_syncinfo
                   where table_name = @table_name
                     and position_str = @position_str
                     for update][count = @sql_row_count][transaction_no = @transaction_no_t]
statements.name: 通用SQL执行
groups:
select transaction_no
                    from uarg_syncinfo
                   where table_name = @table_name
                     and position_str = @position_str
                     for update

arguments.key:
select transaction_no
                    from uarg_syncinfo
                   where table_name

statements.raw: // 输出了查询的字段即等同使用了select..into语句,预览中会判断sql_row_count!=1时设置错误信息,因此需要重置错误信息.

<M>[通用SQL执行][update uarg_syncinfo
                       set transaction_no = @transaction_no
                     where table_name = @table_name
                       and position_str = @position_str][count = @sql_row_count][]
statements.name: 通用SQL执行
groups:
update uarg_syncinfo
                       set transaction_no = @transaction_no
                     where table_name = @table_name
                       and position_str = @position_str

//批量更新时缓存表同步需要拆单条推送并记录日志表. 不解包transaction_no和position_str.

[手工解包开始][umt_begin_account = @umt_begin_account,
                umt_end_account = @umt_end_account,
                acct_rule_type = @acct_rule_type,
                partition_no = @partition_no,
                sysnode_id = @sysnode_id,
                account_len = @account_len,
                transaction_str = @transaction_str,
                operate_mode = @operate_mode][@unpacker_v4]
statements.name: 手工解包开始
groups:
umt_begin_account = @umt_begin_account,
                umt_end_account = @umt_end_account,

                partition_no = @partition_no,

statements.raw: [手工打包头][company_no, board_fin_quota, board_slo_quota, board_total_quota, fin_total_scale, slo_total_scale, credit_total_scale, crdt_total_quota][@packer]
statements.name: 手工打包头
groups: company_no, board_fin_quota, board_slo_quota, board_total_quota, fin_total_scale, slo_total_scale, credit_total_scale, crdt_total_quota

arguments.raw: company_no, board_fin_quota, board_slo_quota, board_total_quota, fin_total_scale, slo_total_scale, credit_total_scale, crdt_total_quota

statements.raw:
<M>[通用SQL执行][select b.company_no,
                       sum(case when cashquota_type = '4' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as board_fin_quota,
                       sum(case when cashquota_type = '5' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as board_slo_quota,
                       sum(case when cashquota_type in ('4', '5') then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as board_total_quota,
                       sum(case when cashquota_type = '0' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as fin_total_scale,
                       sum(case when cashquota_type = '1' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as slo_total_scale,
                       sum(case when cashquota_type = '3' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as credit_total_scale,
                       sum(case when cashquota_type = '2' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as crdt_total_quota
                       from ucrt_busiarg a, cashgroup b
                       where a.cashgroup_no = b.cashgroup_no
                       and b.cashgroup_prop = '0'
                       and b.company_no = @company_no
                       group by b.company_no][]
statements.name: 通用SQL执行
groups:
select b.company_no,
                       sum(case when cashquota_type = '4' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as board_fin_quota,
                       sum(case when cashquota_type = '5' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as board_slo_quota,
                       sum(case when cashquota_type in ('4', '5') then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as board_total_quota,
                       sum(case when cashquota_type = '0' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as fin_total_scale,
                       sum(case when cashquota_type = '1' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as slo_total_scale,
                       sum(case when cashquota_type = '3' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as credit_total_scale,
                       sum(case when cashquota_type = '2' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as crdt_total_quota
                       from ucrt_busiarg a, cashgroup b
                       where a.cashgroup_no = b.cashgroup_no
                       and b.cashgroup_prop = '0'
                       and b.company_no = @company_no
                       group by b.company_no

arguments.value: '4' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as board_fin_quota
'5' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as board_slo_quota

arguments.raw: sum(case when cashquota_type in ('4', '5') then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as board_total_quota

arguments.value: '0' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as fin_total_scale
'1' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as slo_total_scale
'3' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as credit_total_scale

'2' then crdt_total_quota else 0 end) as crdt_total_quota
                       from ucrt_busiarg a

b.cashgroup_no
                       and b.cashgroup_prop = '0'
                       and b.company_no = @company_no
                       group by b.company_no

statements.raw: //内存交易表: ucrt_spcash_account, 唯一索引是 cashgroup_no
//select nvl((select company_no from hs_user.allbranch b where b.branch_no = a.branch_no),0) as company_no,
//       nvl((select cashgroup_name from hs_asset.cashgroup b where b.cashgroup_no = a.cashgroup_no),' ') as cashgroup_name,
//       nvl((select cashgroup_prop from hs_asset.cashgroup b where b.cashgroup_no = a.cashgroup_no),' ') as cashgroup_prop,
//       nvl((select stock_account from hs_asset.stockholder b where b.fund_account = a.fund_account and b.exchange_type ='1' and rownum <=1),' ') as stock_account_sh,
//       nvl((select seat_no from hs_asset.stockholder b where b.fund_account = a.fund_account and b.exchange_type ='1' and rownum <=1),' ') as seat_no_sh,
//       nvl((select stock_account from hs_asset.stockholder b where b.fund_account = a.fund_account and b.exchange_type ='2' and rownum <=1),' ') as stock_account_sz,
//       nvl((select seat_no from hs_asset.stockholder b where b.fund_account = a.fund_account and b.exchange_type ='2' and rownum <=1),' ') as seat_no_sz,
